summary: Preflight artifact main SHA 7c51cd2baf1cca8de20b0133bc6bb00d2dc95dea had no security-sensitive hydrated items. #56072 remains the best canonical issue for the focused daily/idle stale-reset memory-loss cluster. #45608 is related but broader, covering manual /new, /reset, idle, and unified agentic flush semantics, so no closeout is planned. Linked open implementation PRs/issues stay open because they are related, have unresolved review/check/product gates, or are independent of this cluster.
